summary: Single component-scoped CSS rule set for .card-canva-embed. No new color/font/spacing/radius/shadow tokens — brief §5 requires exactly one new rule group.

added.rationale: 16:9 responsive wrapper matching existing .card-attach-video aspect-ratio pattern; reuses --color-bg and the same 8px radius as .card-attach-image for visual consistency. margin-bottom: 8px aligns with sibling .card-attach-image / .card-attach-video wrappers so Canva cards have the same vertical rhythm as YouTube / image cards. min-height: 90px guards the freeform-board edge case (very narrow cards) where 56.25% padding could collapse the iframe below a usable height; on all normal grid/column layouts (card width >= 240px) the padding-bottom dominates and this floor is never hit.
Stack thumbnail and iframe in the same box. Matches phase3 §3-5 contract.
Thumbnail fills wrapper; opacity transition is the pattern's signature animation.
React toggles data-loaded on the wrapper from iframe onLoad; the thumb fades out without unmount so a future re-render can restore it.

rules.rationale: A11y — brief §4-4. Respects user preference; thumb-to-iframe swap becomes instantaneous.

react_contract_notes.state_toggle: Component sets wrapper attribute `data-loaded="true"` via React prop in onLoad handler. Using the attribute rather than class avoids memo contract breakage and keeps styling declarative.
react_contract_notes.dom_order: img BEFORE iframe in JSX so paint order naturally stacks iframe below img without explicit z-index (keeps CSS minimal).
react_contract_notes.iframe_lazy: iframe element MUST include `loading="lazy"` so off-screen Canva embeds defer network until the card enters viewport. Matches phase3 big-board-performance compromise note and reduces concurrent iframe cost on boards with >10 Canva cards.
react_contract_notes.no_new_tokens: No new CSS custom properties are introduced. If future live-embed types (Figma, GeoGebra, etc.) land, promote .card-canva-embed to a generic .card-live-embed in a separate task.
react_contract_notes.no_dangerously_set_inner_html: Per phase3 §5-6, the oEmbed `html` field is never used; iframe is rendered as JSX so no XSS vector is introduced.

not_adding: new color tokens (brand chip / accent variations)
iframe loading spinner (v2 was rejected in comparison.md)
attribution chip (v3 was rejected in comparison.md — duplicates Canva ?meta)
